title: Skins series 2

infobox.value: This article **relies excessively on [references](/wiki/Wikipedia:Verifiability "Wikipedia:Verifiability") to [primary sources](/wiki/Wikipedia:No_original_research#Primary,_secondary_and_tertiary_sources "Wikipedia:No original research")**. Please improve this article by adding [secondary or tertiary sources](/wiki/Wikipedia:No_original_research#Primary,_secondary_and_tertiary_sources "Wikipedia:No original research").  *Find sources:* ["Skins series 2"](https://www.google.com/search?as_eq=wikipedia&q=%22Skins+series+2%22) – [news](https://www.google.com/search?tbm=nws&q=%22Skins+series+2%22+-wikipedia&tbs=ar:1) **·** [newspapers](https://www.google.com/search?&q=%22Skins+series+2%22&tbs=bkt:s&tbm=bks) **·** [books](https://www.google.com/search?tbs=bks:1&q=%22Skins+series+2%22+-wikipedia) **·** [scholar](https://scholar.google.com/scholar?q=%22Skins+series+2%22) **·** [JSTOR](https://www.jstor.org/action/doBasicSearch?Query=%22Skins+series+2%22&acc=on&wc=on) *(November 2024)* *([Learn how and when to remove this message](/wiki/Help:Maintenance_template_removal "Help:Maintenance template removal"))*
No. in series | Title | Featured character(s) | Directed by | Written by | Original release date | UK viewers (millions)

1 | "Tony and Maxxie" | [Tony Stonem](/wiki/Tony_Stonem "Tony Stonem") and [Maxxie Oliver](/wiki/Maxxie_Oliver "Maxxie Oliver") | Aysha Rafaele | [Bryan Elsley](/wiki/Bryan_Elsley "Bryan Elsley") | 11 February 2008 (2008-02-11) | 1.06

infobox.key: Six months on, Tony is still recovering from injuries sustained in the last series. He suffers from [subdural hematoma](/wiki/Subdural_hematoma "Subdural hematoma") leading to learning difficulties, [amnesia](/wiki/Amnesia "Amnesia"), a lack of fine motor skills and personality changes. His mother slips into depression while his father struggles to control his frustration with the change in family dynamic. Sid cannot bear to see Tony in his condition, and Cassie moves up to Scotland. Effy steps up to take care of Tony. Maxxie is confronted by [homophobic](/wiki/Homophobia "Homophobia") youths on his estate and by his father, who is keen for him to stay in college rather than become a dancer. The gang attend a [rave](/wiki/Rave "Rave"), during which Tony has a panic attack and runs out. Maxxie runs out to look for him but is ambushed by the homophobes, one of which catches Maxxie and wrestles him to the ground and tries to kiss him. Maxxie succumbs and the two make out. Tony finds Michelle and Sid talking about him and assures them he will regain his lost memories.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

infobox.value: 2 | "Sketch" | [Lucy Sketch](/wiki/Sketch_(Skins_character) "Sketch (Skins character)") | Aysha Rafaele | [Jack Thorne](/wiki/Jack_Thorne_(writer) "Jack Thorne (writer)") | 18 February 2008 (2008-02-18) | 0.757
3 | "Sid" | [Sid Jenkins](/wiki/Sid_Jenkins "Sid Jenkins") | Simon Massey | Bryan Elsley | 25 February 2008 (2008-02-25) | 0.767

infobox.key: Sid is in despair. Tony is a shadow of his former self and Cassie has settled down in Scotland. Sid and his father, Mark, are visited by Mark's father, brother, and nephews, who constantly belittle Mark and Sid. Mark persuades Sid’s mother to move back home for a day and pretend as though they were not separated. Sid breaks up with Cassie over a misunderstanding. Mark finally takes a stand against his father and brother and orders them to leave. He regrets being cruel to Sid, realizing that's how his father always treated him. He dies of an apparent heart attack that night and Sid discovers his body the next morning. Sid can't come to terms with it and leaves him where he's sitting, telling no one. Tony approaches him, saying people told him they were best friends. They attend a [Crystal Castles](/wiki/Crystal_Castles_(band) "Crystal Castles (band)") gig where Sid opens up to Tony about his problems. Tony and Sid go back to Sid's house where Mark's body is still in the chair. Sid asks if this (his father's death and his breakup) is real. Sid calls his mother, then he boards a train.[[3]](#cite_note-3)

infobox.value: 4 | "Michelle" | [Michelle Richardson](/wiki/Michelle_Richardson "Michelle Richardson") | Simon Massey | Sally Tatchell | 3 March 2008 (2008-03-03) | 0.742

infobox.key: Everyone except Tony goes camping for Michelle's birthday, along with Michelle's new [step-sister](/wiki/Step-sister "Step-sister"). After an emotional conversation with Sid about the death of his father, Michelle has sex with him on the beach out of sight of the rest of the group. Later, she opens her only present from the group, a watch from Tony with a note inside that reads "you wanted some time, happy birthday". Anwar meets with Sketch near the campsite, but Maxxie and Michelle catch them having sex. The group grudgingly approves of their relationship. Michelle and Sid go back to his bedroom, as a couple, to have sex again. But Cassie is sitting on Sid's bed, awaiting his return and catches him with Michelle.[[4]](#cite_note-4)

infobox.value: 5 | "Chris" | [Chris Miles](/wiki/Chris_Miles_(Skins) "Chris Miles (Skins)") | [Harry Enfield](/wiki/Harry_Enfield "Harry Enfield") | [Ben Schiffer](/wiki/Ben_Schiffer "Ben Schiffer") | 10 March 2008 (2008-03-10) | 0.709

infobox.key: Chris is expelled from college and seeks advice from Jal. The two make a pact: Chris has to start looking for a [career](/wiki/Career "Career") while Jal has to say "yes" to anything Chris suggests to get her into trying new things. Tony is relearning how to swim. After a string of failed jobs, Chris becomes an [estate agent](/wiki/Estate_agent "Estate agent"). Chris and Jal get together as a couple following the success of their pact. They squat in a flat that Chris's estate agency was supposed to sell. Cassie also moves in. Cassie lies to Chris telling him Jal left him. Angie comes into Chris's workplace to buy a house. Chris cheats on Jal with her. Chris and Jal split up. Chris loses his job when his boss discovers him and his friends in the flat. Jal discovers she is pregnant. Chris explains his loneliness to Jal and how she turned his life around and they get back together. Chris moves into Angie's old house.[[5]](#cite_note-5)

infobox.value: 6 | "[Tony](/wiki/Tony_(Skins_series_2) "Tony (Skins series 2)")" | [Tony Stonem](/wiki/Tony_Stonem "Tony Stonem") | Harry Enfield | [Jamie Brittain](/wiki/Jamie_Brittain "Jamie Brittain") | 17 March 2008 (2008-03-17) | 0.751
7 | "Effy" | [Effy Stonem](/wiki/Effy_Stonem "Effy Stonem") | Simon Massey | [Lucy Kirkwood](/wiki/Lucy_Kirkwood "Lucy Kirkwood") | 24 March 2008 (2008-03-24) | 0.686

[newspapers](https://www.google.com/search?&q=%22Skins+series+2%22&tbs=bkt:s&tbm=bks) **·** [books](https://www.google.com/search?tbs=bks:1&q=%22Skins+series+2%22+-wikipedia) **·** [scholar](https://scholar.google.com/scholar?q=%22Skins+series+2%22) **·** [JSTOR](https://www.jstor.org/action/doBasicSearch?Query=%22Skins+series+2%22&acc=on&wc=on) *(November 2024)* *([Learn how and when to remove this message](/wiki/Help:Maintenance_template_removal "Help:Maintenance template removal"))* |
This episode marks the first appearance of Sketch. Cassie is absent from this episode. | | | | | | | | |

2nd series of the British television show Skins

***[Skins](/wiki/Skins_(British_TV_series) "Skins (British TV series)")*** is a British [teen drama](/wiki/Teen_drama "Teen drama") created by father-and-son television writers [Bryan Elsley](/wiki/Bryan_Elsley "Bryan Elsley") and [Jamie Brittain](/wiki/Jamie_Brittain "Jamie Brittain") for [Company Pictures](/wiki/Company_Pictures "Company Pictures"). The second series began airing on [E4](/wiki/E4_(channel) "E4 (channel)") on 11 February 2008 and ended on 14 April 2008. Like the [previous series](/wiki/Skins_series_1 "Skins series 1"), this series follows the lives of the [first generation](/wiki/List_of_Skins_characters#First_generation "List of Skins characters"), which consists of [Tony Stonem](/wiki/Tony_Stonem "Tony Stonem"), [Michelle Richardson](/wiki/Michelle_Richardson "Michelle Richardson"), [Sid Jenkins](/wiki/Sid_Jenkins "Sid Jenkins"), [Cassie Ainsworth](/wiki/Cassie_Ainsworth "Cassie Ainsworth"), [Chris Miles](/wiki/Chris_Miles_(Skins) "Chris Miles (Skins)"), [Jal Fazer](/wiki/Jal_Fazer "Jal Fazer"), [Maxxie Oliver](/wiki/Maxxie_Oliver "Maxxie Oliver") and [Anwar Kharral](/wiki/Anwar_Kharral "Anwar Kharral").

## List of episodes

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Skins_series_2&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: List of episodes")]

Main article: [List of Skins episodes](/wiki/List_of_Skins_episodes "List of Skins episodes")

| No. overall | No. in series | Title | Featured character(s) | Directed by | Written by | Original release date | UK viewers (millions) |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 10 | 1 | "Tony and Maxxie" | [Tony Stonem](/wiki/Tony_Stonem "Tony Stonem") and [Maxxie Oliver](/wiki/Maxxie_Oliver "Maxxie Oliver") | Aysha Rafaele | [Bryan Elsley](/wiki/Bryan_Elsley "Bryan Elsley") | 11 February 2008 (2008-02-11) | 1.06 |
| Six months on, Tony is still recovering from injuries sustained in the last series. He suffers from [subdural hematoma](/wiki/Subdural_hematoma "Subdural hematoma") leading to learning difficulties, [amnesia](/wiki/Amnesia "Amnesia"), a lack of fine motor skills and personality changes. His mother slips into depression while his father struggles to control his frustration with the change in family dynamic. Sid cannot bear to see Tony in his condition, and Cassie moves up to Scotland. Effy steps up to take care of Tony. Maxxie is confronted by [homophobic](/wiki/Homophobia "Homophobia") youths on his estate and by his father, who is keen for him to stay in college rather than become a dancer. The gang attend a [rave](/wiki/Rave "Rave"), during which Tony has a panic attack and runs out. Maxxie runs out to look for him but is ambushed by the homophobes, one of which catches Maxxie and wrestles him to the ground and tries to kiss him. Maxxie succumbs and the two make out. Tony finds Michelle and Sid talking about him and assures them he will regain his lost memories.[[1]](#cite_note-1) | | | | | | | | |
| 11 | 2 | "Sketch" | [Lucy Sketch](/wiki/Sketch_(Skins_character) "Sketch (Skins character)") | Aysha Rafaele | [Jack Thorne](/wiki/Jack_Thorne_(writer) "Jack Thorne (writer)") | 18 February 2008 (2008-02-18) | 0.757 |
| Sketch is a young carer for her disabled mother and is [obsessed](/wiki/Limerence "Limerence") with Maxxie. Her schemes to make him fall in love with her endanger the college's production of "Osama: The Musical" and lead her to lie about the drama teacher [molesting](/wiki/Child_sexual_abuse "Child sexual abuse") her to get a role in the play. Sketch befriends Michelle after seeing her fail to seduce a hesitant Tony, who suffers from [erectile dysfunction](/wiki/Erectile_dysfunction "Erectile dysfunction") following his injury. Sketch drugs Michelle to take her part in the play as Maxxie's love interest. The two kiss on stage as written, but Maxxie tells Sketch that he felt nothing. She slaps him and bursts into tears on stage. That night, she has sex with his best friend Anwar.[[2]](#cite_note-2)   ---  **Note:** This episode marks the first appearance of Sketch. Cassie is absent from this episode. | | | | | | | | |
| 12 | 3 | "Sid" | [Sid Jenkins](/wiki/Sid_Jenkins "Sid Jenkins") | Simon Massey | Bryan Elsley | 25 February 2008 (2008-02-25) | 0.767 |
| Sid is in despair. Tony is a shadow of his former self and Cassie has settled down in Scotland. Sid and his father, Mark, are visited by Mark's father, brother, and nephews, who constantly belittle Mark and Sid. Mark persuades Sid’s mother to move back home for a day and pretend as though they were not separated. Sid breaks up with Cassie over a misunderstanding. Mark finally takes a stand against his father and brother and orders them to leave. He regrets being cruel to Sid, realizing that's how his father always treated him. He dies of an apparent heart attack that night and Sid discovers his body the next morning. Sid can't come to terms with it and leaves him where he's sitting, telling no one. Tony approaches him, saying people told him they were best friends. They attend a [Crystal Castles](/wiki/Crystal_Castles_(band) "Crystal Castles (band)") gig where Sid opens up to Tony about his problems. Tony and Sid go back to Sid's house where Mark's body is still in the chair. Sid asks if this (his father's death and his breakup) is real. Sid calls his mother, then he boards a train.[[3]](#cite_note-3) | | | | | | | | |
| 13 | 4 | "Michelle" | [Michelle Richardson](/wiki/Michelle_Richardson "Michelle Richardson") | Simon Massey | Sally Tatchell | 3 March 2008 (2008-03-03) | 0.742 |
| Everyone except Tony goes camping for Michelle's birthday, along with Michelle's new [step-sister](/wiki/Step-sister "Step-sister"). After an emotional conversation with Sid about the death of his father, Michelle has sex with him on the beach out of sight of the rest of the group. Later, she opens her only present from the group, a watch from Tony with a note inside that reads "you wanted some time, happy birthday". Anwar meets with Sketch near the campsite, but Maxxie and Michelle catch them having sex. The group grudgingly approves of their relationship. Michelle and Sid go back to his bedroom, as a couple, to have sex again. But Cassie is sitting on Sid's bed, awaiting his return and catches him with Michelle.[[4]](#cite_note-4) | | | | | | | | |
| 14 | 5 | "Chris" | [Chris Miles](/wiki/Chris_Miles_(Skins) "Chris Miles (Skins)") | [Harry Enfield](/wiki/Harry_Enfield "Harry Enfield") | [Ben Schiffer](/wiki/Ben_Schiffer "Ben Schiffer") | 10 March 2008 (2008-03-10) | 0.709 |
| Chris is expelled from college and seeks advice from Jal. The two make a pact: Chris has to start looking for a [career](/wiki/Career "Career") while Jal has to say "yes" to anything Chris suggests to get her into trying new things. Tony is relearning how to swim. After a string of failed jobs, Chris becomes an [estate agent](/wiki/Estate_agent "Estate agent"). Chris and Jal get together as a couple following the success of their pact. They squat in a flat that Chris's estate agency was supposed to sell. Cassie also moves in. Cassie lies to Chris telling him Jal left him. Angie comes into Chris's workplace to buy a house. Chris cheats on Jal with her. Chris and Jal split up. Chris loses his job when his boss discovers him and his friends in the flat. Jal discovers she is pregnant. Chris explains his loneliness to Jal and how she turned his life around and they get back together. Chris moves into Angie's old house.[[5]](#cite_note-5) | | | | | | | | |
| 15 | 6 | "[Tony](/wiki/Tony_(Skins_series_2) "Tony (Skins series 2)")" | [Tony Stonem](/wiki/Tony_Stonem "Tony Stonem") | Harry Enfield | [Jamie Brittain](/wiki/Jamie_Brittain "Jamie Brittain") | 17 March 2008 (2008-03-17) | 0.751 |
| At a nightclub, Michelle and Sid reveal they are a couple. Cassie states Tony should be with Michelle in an attempt to get with Sid. Tony laughs off the idea. Tony takes [ecstasy](/wiki/Ecstasy_(drug) "Ecstasy (drug)") and elements of his old personality surface. He confronts Sid and Michelle about their relationship before vomiting in the toilets. He meets a girl ([Janet Montgomery](/wiki/Janet_Montgomery "Janet Montgomery")) whom he later sees at a university open day. She is provocative and outspoken, helping Tony overcome his erectile dysfunction. She gets a tattoo and they then have sex in a [dormitory](/wiki/Dormitory "Dormitory"). Afterward, Tony goes to the nightclub again and interrupts Sid and Michelle having sex in a toilet. He tells them their relationship is wrong and leaves. Both Sid and Michelle have doubts about their relationship.[[6]](#cite_note-6)   ---  **Note:** Sketch is largely absent from this episode. | | | | | | | | |
| 16 | 7 | "Effy" | [Effy Stonem](/wiki/Effy_Stonem "Effy Stonem") | Simon Massey | [Lucy Kirkwood](/wiki/Lucy_Kirkwood "Lucy Kirkwood") | 24 March 2008 (2008-03-24) | 0.686 |
| With her father away on a work trip and her mother suffering from depression, Effy becomes the responsible adult in the Stonem household. Tony is coming to terms with his personality. At Effy’s private school she is tasked with completing her art coursework and mentoring the new girl, Pandora Moon. They become friends. Sid and Michelle break up. Sid wants to get back with Cassie but she has resorted to [promiscuity](/wiki/Promiscuity "Promiscuity"). Sid does Effy’s art coursework in exchange for Effy getting them back together. Revealing his inner emotions, Sid completes the coursework. Effy buys cannabis and sells it at a nightclub with Pandora and Tony. They find Jake who is tasked with seducing Cassie. He goes round hers and they kiss, Effy photographs this and posts the pictures around Sid. He confronts Cassie and the two argue. Sid states she was not there for him when his dad died. He confesses he always loved her and they get back together. Michelle tells Tony she loves him.[[7]](#cite_note-7)   ---  **Note:** This episode marks the first appearance of Pandora. Jal, Anwar, Maxxie and Sketch are absent from this episode. | | | | | | | | |
| 17 | 8 | "Jal" | [Jal Fazer](/wiki/Jal_Fazer "Jal Fazer") | Simon Massey | [Daniel Kaluuya](/wiki/Daniel_Kaluuya "Daniel Kaluuya") | 31 March 2008 (2008-03-31) | 0.686 |
| Jal attempts to tell Chris she is pregnant but considers having an [abortion](/wiki/Abortion "Abortion"). Examinations are approaching. Jal’s father wants Jal to concentrate on exams and dump Chris. Meanwhile Chris has rented a house with Cassie, and wants Jal to move in. Michelle is embroiled in Spanish revision so Jal tells her she is pregnant in Spanish. Michelle does not understand and instead walks off with Tony. Jal tells her family she is pregnant. Her father demands she acts quickly. Jal’s mother makes a surprise return to instruct Jal to have an abortion. Cassie finds out Jal is pregnant and suggests she tells Chris. Jal attends her music audition. She goes to Chris’s house to confess her pregnancy but Cassie is there and informs Jal that Chris has been rushed to hospital. The nurse tells Jal that Chris is going into surgery because there is a [blood clot](/wiki/Blood_clot "Blood clot") on his brain, and that his brother had died of the same thing.[[8]](#cite_note-8) | | | | | | | | |
| 18 | 9 | "Cassie" | [Cassie Ainsworth](/wiki/Cassie_Ainsworth "Cassie Ainsworth") | [Charles Martin](/wiki/Charles_Martin_(director) "Charles Martin (director)") | Bryan Elsley | 7 April 2008 (2008-04-07) | 0.766 |
| Chris is discharged from hospital and is recovering, and Cassie sits her philosophy exam. Sid cooks a meal for Cassie to celebrate the end of her exams and invites Tony, Michelle and Jal. Tension between Michelle and Cassie lead to Michelle accidentally revealing that Jal is pregnant, which leaves Chris distraught. Chris's mother appears at the entrance of the flat but is unable to approach Chris to say hello. Cassie overhears Chris crying in his bedroom, and he later becomes ill again, forgets Jal’s name and has a blood pressure build up on the membrane, dying in Cassie’s arms. Distraught, Cassie flees to [New York](/wiki/New_York_City "New York City"), homeless, penniless and mentally unstable. She is taken in by a kind waiter from [Iowa](/wiki/Iowa "Iowa"), named Adam, with whom she develops a platonic friendship. Cassie stays a night at Adam's apartment, and wakes up to find a note saying that he'd be gone away for a while. This leaves Cassie distraught and the episode ends with Cassie running through the streets of [New York](/wiki/New_York_City "New York City").[[9]](#cite_note-9)   ---  **Note:** This episode marks the final appearance of Chris. Sketch is absent from this episode. | | | | | | | | |
| 19 | 10 | "Final Goodbyes" | Everyone | Charles Martin | Jack Thorne | 14 April 2008 (2008-04-14) | 0.766 |
| It is A-Level results day and the day of Chris’s funeral. The gang decide to open the results after the funeral. Chris’s father visits Sid to tell him they aren't invited to the funeral. Sid and Tony steal Chris's coffin in an attempt to hold their own funeral, but are convinced to return it by Jal. Jal tells Michelle she got an abortion. The gang converge on a hilltop overlooking the graveyard and Jal makes an emotional speech, likening Chris to [Captain Joe Kittinger](/wiki/Joseph_Kittinger "Joseph Kittinger"). They read out their results to each other that night. Maxxie and his new boyfriend leave for [London](/wiki/London "London") and take Anwar with them leaving a devastated Sketch. Tony and Michelle decide to stay together for university. Tony buys Sid tickets to New York where he goes to find Cassie. He is last shown outside the diner where Cassie works, their backs turned to each other, unaware of each other. The series finishes with Effy in Tony's bed smiling up into the camera.[[10]](#cite_note-10)   ---  **Note:** This episode marks the final appearances of Tony, Sid, Jal, Michelle, Maxxie, Anwar and Sketch. | | | | | | | | |
